title: 9L INT6 AR-GPTQ + XSA-all + BigramHash 3072×112 (≤16MB)
author: X-Abhishek-X
body:
## Approach

**Architecture:** 9-layer transformer (dim=512, GQA 8H/4KV, RoPE-16, LeakyReLU(0.5)²) with Cross-Sequence Attention (XSA) on all layers.

**Key techniques:**
- **BigramHash** embedding table: 3072 vocab × 112 dim
- **Value Enhancement (VE)** layers at positions 7,8 (last 2 of 9L)
- **Uniform INT6 quantization** with AR self-generated GPTQ calibration (64 seqs × 2048 tokens, temp=0.8)
- **SoftRound QAT** at 15% of warmdown
- **Parallel Muon optimizer** + EMA(0.997) + SWA during warmdown
- **Selective weight pruning** to meet 16MB artifact constraint

**Based on:** PR #1019 merged SOTA techniques, adapted to 9L for 16MB compliance.

## Results

Training in progress on 8×H100 SXM, 560s wallclock budget. Val BPB to be updated.

## Checklist
- [x] Trains in ≤ 600s on 8×H100 SXM
- [x] Artifact ≤ 16MB
- [ ] Val BPB: TBD (pending compute)
